name: Meilisearch (uvx)
description: Interact with Meilisearch search engine instances. Manage indexes, documents, and settings; run searches with filtering and sorting; administer API keys and monitor tasks, health, and stats.

inputs.label: Meilisearch URL
inputs.description: The HTTP address of your Meilisearch instance, including scheme and port.

inputs.label: Master Key
inputs.description: Master key or API key for authenticating with your Meilisearch instance. Required for Meilisearch Cloud and any instance started with a master key.

obtain.instructions:
Meilisearch Cloud:
1. Open https://cloud.meilisearch.com and select your project
2. Go to Settings > API keys
3. Copy the Master key (or a key with the scopes you need)

Self-hosted:
Use the value passed to --master-key (or the MEILI_MASTER_KEY env var) when you started the meilisearch binary.

auth.instructions: Provide your Meilisearch instance URL and a master/API key. Get a key from Meilisearch Cloud (Settings > API keys) or use the master key configured on your self-hosted instance.
